name: DARLING INGREDIENTS INC.
summary: PART I GENERAL Founded by the Swift meat packing interests and the Darling family in 1882, Darling Ingredients Inc. (Darling, and together with its subsidiaries, the Company or we, us or our) was incorporated in Delaware in 1962 under the name Darling-Delaware Company, Inc.Darling changed its name from Darling-Delaware Company, Inc. to Darling International Inc.on December 28, 1993, and fromDarling International Inc. to Darling Ingredients Inc. on May 6, 2014.
